name: RPlog_The_Right_Price
title: Hiring a Scout at Chalmun's
summary: In Chalmun's Cantina on Tatooine, the fastidious New Republic naval officer Rasi -- Commander Cen -- waits with a cloaked Leia Organa-Solo to recruit the veteran smuggler Krackor Reincus for a clandestine mission. Over watered-down Corellian ale, they ask him to slip past the minefields and fortifications of the Kessel Redoubt and run detailed scans of Imperial installations across the Kessel, Kubindi, and Fvillswing systems, using a data crystal Leia provides to shorten the scan time. Krackor, who knows the region from his smuggling days, sizes up the danger and the pay. When Rasi lowballs him at twenty-five hundred credits, Leia overrides her colleague with a firm ten thousand, and Krackor agrees -- demanding five thousand up front plus expenses and trading good-natured jabs about a past run-in with Rasi over Mon Calamari. The deal is struck, the down payment handed over, and Krackor departs with mutual promises of future business.
